action_checkin_desc: I'm a visitor and I've just arrived
action_checkout_desc: I'm leaving and want to register my exit
legal_scroll_hint: Scroll to the bottom to continue
legal_check_rules: I have read and accept the facility access and security rules.
legal_check_rgpd: I have been informed and I accept the processing of my personal data.
legal_signature_hint: Sign with your finger or mouse
legal_both_required: You must accept both points to continue.
confirmation_exit_dni: When you leave, register your exit by entering your ID document at the reception screen.
checkout_dni_instruction: Enter your ID document to register your exit
confirmation_reset_msg: This screen will reset in {secs} seconds
checkout_done_msg: Thank you for your visit. See you soon!
checkout_not_found: Code not found or already used.
error_system_unavailable: The registration system is not available at this time.
error_generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
error_dni_already_active: This document already has an active visit. If you have left without registering your exit, please ask for help at reception.
error_dni_blocked: Registration cannot be completed. Please go to reception.
code_button_desc: If you have been sent a fast-track access code, enter it here
code_input_subtitle: You will find the code in the email or message that was sent to you. It has 8 characters.
code_invalid: Code not valid or already used. Please proceed with the normal registration.
lookup_found: Data retrieved from a previous visit.
validation_error: Please correct the errors in the form.
